name: ger40_donchian_breakout_m5_v1
hypothesis: On GER40 M5, a close beyond the 40-bar Donchian extreme during high-ATR-percentile regime (>60th) produces sustained continuation for ~20 bars. A loose session mask (06:00–18:00 broker time) avoids thin overnight moves but does NOT hard-gate on UTC.

entry.long: close > donchian_high(40, shifted 1 bar) AND atr_pct >= 60
entry.short: close < donchian_low(40, shifted 1 bar) AND atr_pct >= 60

notes: CRITICAL: session_mask falls back to all_on if TZ resolution fails (prior-gen zero-trade bug). Verify GER40/DE40/DAX40 alias. Donchian lookback 40 requires ≥40 bars warmup — log first-trade bar index.
